form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== orgId[业务组织] configId[MFT配置] relatedBillType[关联单据类型] relatedBillCode[关联单据号] direction[方向] =========>file[文件]====== fileName[文件名] fileSize[文件大小(字节)] fileHash[文件哈希] messageId[AS2 Message-ID] =========>transfer[传输]====== mdnStatus[MDN状态] protocol[传输协议] status[传输状态] startTime[开始时间] endTime[结束时间] durationMs[耗时(毫秒)] =========>error[错误]====== errorCode[错误码] errorMsg[错误消息] retryCount[重试次数] =========>flags[标志]====== isCompressed[压缩] isEncrypted[加密] isSigned[签名] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== orgId[业务组织] configId[MFT配置] relatedBillType[关联单据类型] relatedBillCode[关联单据号] direction[方向] =========>file[文件]====== fileName[文件名] fileSize[文件大小(字节)] fileHash[文件哈希] messageId[AS2 Message-ID] =========>transfer[传输]====== mdnStatus[MDN状态] protocol[传输协议] status[传输状态] startTime[开始时间] endTime[结束时间] durationMs[耗时(毫秒)] =========>error[错误]====== errorCode[错误码] errorMsg[错误消息] retryCount[重试次数] =========>flags[标志]====== isCompressed[压缩] isEncrypted[加密] isSigned[签名] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: orgId[业务组织] configId[MFT配置] direction[方向] status[传输状态] startTime[开始时间]
